creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Gleb Sushko <neuroworker@gmail.com> writes:

> New patched version, fix for crashes and new features.
[...]
> -MASTER_SITES=	http://mikmod.raphnet.net/files/
> +MASTER_SITES=	http://209.44.102.205/FreeBSD/distfiles/
> +WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}.patched
> 
> -PATCH_SITES=	http://mikmod.raphnet.net/files/
> -PATCHFILES=	libmikmod-3.1.11-a.diff
> -PATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
> -

Can you re-use SF mirrors by splitting them from vanilla tarball?
It'll also get rid of some build junk

  libmikmod-3.1.12.patched/macosx/Cocoa Framework-Info.plist          |   24
  libmikmod-3.1.12.patched/macosx/config.h                            |  152 ++
  libmikmod-3.1.12.patched/macosx/libmikmod.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj |  658 +++++++++
  libmikmod-3.1.12.patched/macosx/mikmod.h                            |  717 ++++++++++
  libmikmod-3.1.12.patched/macosx/mikmod_build.h                      |  717 ++++++++++
  5 files changed, 2268 insertions(+)

as it's not part of the patches

  libmikmod-3.1.12-64bit-fix.diff
  libmikmod-3.1.12-exitcrash-fix.diff
  libmikmod-3.1.12-loopingvolume-fix.diff
  libmikmod-3.1.12-md_sngchn-fix.diff
  libmikmod-CVE-2009-0179.patch
